---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new benchmark for nvprobe
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when I can't benchmark [Specific Workload]..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., "Add a new Custom Kernel for testing Flash Attention", "Add support for LSF schedulers").

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or tools you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links to NVIDIA documentation, research papers, or screenshots about the feature request here.
